refreshNotes: Checked public Facebook event listings, Google-discovered results, and official farm event pages on April 19, 2026. Facebook event pages were not directly readable from this environment during this run, so the refresh favors currently verifiable official event pages and official event listings.

events.name: DeBuck's Tulip Festival
events.time: Wed-Fri 12:00 PM-8:00 PM, Sat-Sun 10:00 AM-8:00 PM
events.location: DeBuck's Family Farm, 50240 Martz Road, Belleville, MI 48111
events.description: Verified on DeBuck's official site during this refresh. The farm is promoting its April 17 to 26 tulip festival as Metro Detroit's largest, with spring attractions, food, and photo-friendly bloom fields.

events.name: Blake's 2nd Annual Tulip Festival
events.time: Mon-Thu train rides 11:00 AM-4:00 PM, Fri-Sun train rides 8:00 AM-5:00 PM
events.location: Blake's Orchard & Cider Mill, 17985 Armada Center Road, Armada, MI 48005
events.description: Verified on Blake Farms' official Blake's In Bloom page during this refresh. The 2026 tulip festival is advertised as opening April 25 with more than 200,000 tulips, orchard trail experiences, and rides out to the fields.

events.name: Farm to Glass Experience
events.description: Verified on Blake Farms' official event page during this refresh. The ticketed evening features four chef-crafted courses paired with Blake's hard cider and seasonal ingredients.

events.name: Barks & Blooms
events.location: Blake's Lyon Township, 71485 Silver Lake Rd, South Lyon, MI 48178
events.description: Verified on Blake Farms' official event page during this refresh. This two-day spring event invites guests to walk the orchard and bloom areas with their dogs, with photo spots, contests, and plant-opening festivities.

events.name: Maybury Farm Fest
events.location: Maybury Farm, 50165 8 Mile Rd., Northville, MI 48167
events.description: Verified on Maybury Farm's official events page during this refresh. The spring festival includes baby animals, seed planting, family activities, bluegrass music, games, and food trucks. The page lists May 17 as the rain date.

events.name: Eastern Market Flower Day
events.description: Verified on Eastern Market's official event listings page during this refresh. Flower Day is listed as the annual Sunday event with more than 150 flower vendors, live music, food, and all-ages festivities.

events.name: Farm Explorers
events.location: Upland Hills Farm, 481 Lake George Road, Oxford, MI 48370
events.description: Verified on Upland Hills Farm's official Farm Explorers page during this refresh. The May drop-off workshops are pitched for animal and nature lovers and run across five Saturday sessions in May.
